output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?team ?foundationYear ?promotionYear WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P3005 wd:Q4209853 ; wdt:P1594 ?venue ; wdt:P571 ?foundationYear ; wdt:P1052 ?promotionYear .
  ?venue wdt:P1182 ?capacity .
  ?capacity wikibase:quantityAmount ?number .
  FILTER(?number = 3280)
}
output.answer: The Metal Ligaen team that plays in the arena with a capacity of 3,280 was founded in 1975 and promoted in 2010.
